target: 9. Turning the Tables
Shinpei Ajiro
This is...
(Right before the battle with the Shadows begins—)
(Right after showing Ushio's memories to everyone gathered in the gym...)
Shinpei, we need to hurry and share the memories with everyone...!
No way...
Tokiko…!
("By my own will, the human me has died.")
(That's what Shadow Toki-chan said back then.)
(It's a time that has already been set in stone... We can't save Toki-chan anymore.)
Did Tokiko really... become a Shadow...!
We really can't save her anymore!?
U-Uuu... Tokiko...
*Sniff*... ...H-Hey, Shin-chan.
That Tokiko who became a Shadow... Don't you think she's somehow different from my Shadow?
Yeah, I thought so too.
Exactly! It was just like the real Tokiko...
Actually, could it be possible that she really was the real one!?
If she was just a Shadow, she wouldn't have made such a pained face seeing me about to die! Right!?
Is there a possibility she was acting in order to confuse you?

That wasn't acting!
We can tell!
Could it be... it's the same as Mom? Even after becoming a Shadow, she hasn't changed at all from when she was human...
Perhaps... Shadow Tokiko's information and emotions are being intentionally adjusted.
I see. That would be much more effective at toying with us than making a Shadow do some poor acting.
The closer the relationship with the opponent, the more effective it'll be.
Damn it, Tokiko...
(Even after being turned into a Shadow, Toki-chan is... still being deceived into thinking it's to keep her mother alive?)
Everyone, this is no time to be feeling down! We need to hurry and free Toki-chan!
Yeah, you're right. This time for sure...
You, the limit of your loops is approaching, isn't it? How many chances do you have left?
...Probably, this is the last one.
Th-This is the last one!? Then, if Shinpei-kun dies next...
The end. That's what it means, right?
I haven't heard anything about that!! A-Are you sure!?
Every time I loop, it's like a cliff is crumbling, and I can feel the edges of time disappearing.
When I looped earlier, I saw that cliff closing in right up to me.
If I die next, my loop destination will be beyond that pitch-black cliff.
There will be absolutely no footing there, and you'll fall into an endless darkness... Is that it?
Yes…
Haine must have noticed that too and is coming to take his life. It's safe to assume that's the truth.
S-Seriously...? This is... our last chance!
Whether it's the last one or not, the action we must take remains the same. Isn't that right, Shinpei Ajiro?
Yes!
Once more in this place…
We'll intercept them!!
They're here…
Haine! Shide!
Hello, Shinpei-kun. Sorry to keep you waiting. I was gathering everyone, so I ended up being late.
(And so, once again... the battle at the school began.)
We're making a run for it!!
Onee-chan, wait!!
I won't let you escape!
(Haine and the others didn't show any major changes in their movements.)
(They probably judged that if they did the same as last time, they'd be able to kill me again.)
(Just like last time, we left Shide and the others to Ryunosuke-san, Nezu-san, Totsumura-san, and Koyuba-san, while we headed for the gym.)
Aaaaaau!!
Vuuuuuuuu!!
(But from here on out, it's different from last time.)
(Last time, Sou, Mio, and I couldn't do a thing against those Shadows called "Roz" and "Gil".)
(So this time—)
Ushio, right there!!
Deryaaaa!!!
Aaaau...!?
Alright!
(Having Ushio clash with Roz and Gil right off the bat was the right move!)

Roz!!
Why…!?
(It seems Toki-chan doesn't have memories of the battle from the 7th loop.)
(In other words... she doesn't remember Sou's desperate pleas either...)
(If that's the case, then Ushio and I will have to...)
(We have to tell Toki-chan about what happened in the Hiruko Cave, and that her link—her control—under Haine can be severed!)
Toki-chan, listen to me!
Haine is going to betray you, Toki-chan!! I saw it with my own eyes!

That's impossible!!
Go, Gil!!
Hoyaaaaa!!!
(Toki-chan's reaction is the same as last time. Eventually, her agitation should reach its peak.)
(We'll strike at that opening with everything we've got, and seize our chance at victory!)
Toki-chan, stop! Please listen to what we have to say!
Th-There's no need to listen to... !
Tokiko! You don't need to listen to what they're saying!
Huh... ah!?
Ooryaaaaa!!
Uugh...!?
Alright! I caught her!
Ahh... I should have just left Tokiko alone.
You did it, Sou-kun!!
(Alright, they successfully captured Shadow Mio over there!)
(The momentum is shifting our way!)
Onee-chan, Shin-chan! We're done over here, so we'll help you guys next!
Yeah, that helps!
Tokiko, aren't you going to surrender yet?
Vuuu…
Don't let your guard down, Mio-chan. Tokiko should still have her gun.
Y-Yeah.

Tokiko, you heard from Shinpei, right!
You're being deceived by Haine and the others!
I can't believe that story.
How many times do I have to say it!? You'll understand once you see Ushio's memories!
Shinpei and Ushio have looped many times and changed the future!
Believe in Shinpei! Even the future where you get betrayed, Shinpei and Ushio will definitely change it!
E-Even if you say that...!
Hey, Toki-chan. Please, won't you properly listen to what we have to say?
(Now!)
Big brother!?
Crap, I messed up...! I really can't bring myself to shoot someone with the same face as my sister!

Big brother…
You tried to set me up!?
Gil, smash him!!
Hoyaaaaaa!!!
Wait, wait a sec, Tokiko!
Gil, one more shot!
Hoyaaaaa!!!
Flamethrower!!
Ouaaaaa...!!
You saved me, Mio-chan!!
Shadow's plane, I'm taking it!!
Hoya…!?
Alright!!
Alright! We took out the other one too!
Hey, Tokiko. Since it's come to this, just give up and—
Not yet... I haven't lost yet!
Tokiko?!
Is that gun your final trump card?
No...! Even without this, there's no way I'd lose to you, older brother.
Then… prove it.
Even without that, you won't lose to me, right?
Then, throw that gun away. And listen properly to what Shinpei and Ushio have to say.
In the end... what if I can't trust what Ushio-san and the others are saying?
In that case... Yeah, you can just kill me. I won't put up any resistance.
Hey, Sou!
It's fine. If I don't show this much resolve, I won't be able to get through to Tokiko right now.
I'm begging you with my life on the line. I'm expecting a good answer.
You're always like this...
You're really always like this, trying to look cool.
T-Trying to look cool...
Alright, older brother. I'll listen to what you have to say.
I'll leave this gun with you. You can use it or break it, do whatever you want.
O-Oh.
Then, without further ado... Ushio, I'm counting on you.
Leave it to me! Things like this are no good!
Oorya!!
Haha, mission complete!
A copy gun that can shoot infinitely, huh. Isn't it a bit of a waste?
No, this is for the best. I wouldn't want anyone holding onto something like that.
Hey, I don't mind listening, but...
I still have my connection to Haine...
I told you, right? Ushio should be able to sever your connection to Haine.
If that's the case... Please do it, Ushio-san.
Yeah, once I sever your connection to Haine— your link— you'll be free, Toki-chan.
After that, I'll show you my memories. Then you should be able to understand everything.
Yes…
Th... Thank goodness...! Thank goodness...
S-Sou-kun!?
What's wrong, Sou? Did your legs give out on you!?
Sh-Shut up... I just let my guard down for a second...
Thank... ugh, thank goodness!
Uwoooooo! I'm so glad, I really am!!
You're crying so much!
It took so long... She finally understood...
Yeah, now we won't have to fight Tokiko anymore.
I'm sorry, Mio, older brother...
Shinpei, is it okay if I do it now?
Grant Ushio permission
Apply Shadow Pin to Tokiko
Yeah, please do.
Toki-chan, just relax for a bit.
It's not going to hurt that much, so you can relax.
Ushio, wait a second.
Eh, what is it?
What's wrong, Shinpei! Hurry up and free Tokiko!
Older brother...
You don't have to be so scared! If you leave it to Ushio and Shinpei, there won't be any problems.
(I-I can't... To drive a nail into Shadow Toki-chan's Shadow in this situation...)
(There's no way I can do that.)
What's wrong, Shinpei?
N-No, it's nothing. Ushio, I'll leave the rest to you.
Then let's start, Toki-chan.
Yes…
Then, just like that, take my hand—
Wha!?
I broke the promise…
A-Gah...
Ushio! Are you okay!?
Why! Why did you do that, Tokiko!?
I'm sorry, older brother.
S-Sorry, you say...!
Shi... n... pei...
U… Ushio?
Ushioooooooo!!!!
